text:
theorem prop_000004 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R
  assume h2: P
  have h3: R and P by and_intro h1 h2
  conclude R and P by h3

theorem prop_000005 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P -> Q
  have h3: Q by mp h1 h2
  assume h2: P
  conclude Q by h3

theorem prop_000006 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R -> P
  assume h2: R
  assume h_extra: Q
  have h3: P by mp h1 h2
  conclude P by h3

theorem prop_000007 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R -> P
  have h3: P by mp h1 h2
  assume h2: R
  conclude P by h3

theorem prop_000008 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P -> Q
  assume h2: P
  assume h_extra: R
  have h3: Q by mp h1 h2
  conclude Q by h3

theorem prop_000009 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R
  assume h2: not R
  have h3: false by neg_elim h1 h2
  conclude false by h3

theorem prop_000010 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P
  have h2: P or Q by or_intro_left h1
  conclude P or Q by h2

theorem prop_000011 using intuitionistic_prop:
  have h1: R by copy ghost
  conclude R by h1

theorem prop_000012 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R
  assume h2: not R
  have h3: false by neg_elim h1 h2
  conclude false by h3

theorem prop_000013 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q
  assume h2: not Q
  have h3: false by neg_elim h1 h2
  conclude false by h3

theorem prop_000014 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q
  have h2: P or Q by or_intro_right h1
  conclude P or Q by h2

theorem prop_000015 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R and Q
  have h2: Q by and_elim_left h1
  conclude Q by h2

theorem prop_000016 using intuitionistic_prop:
  suppose h1: R
    have h2: R by copy h1
  have h3: R -> R by imp_intro h1 h2
  conclude R -> R by h3

theorem prop_000017 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q
  have h2: Q or P by or_intro_left h1
  conclude Q or P by h2

theorem prop_000018 using intuitionistic_prop:
  have h1: R by copy ghost
  conclude R by h1

theorem prop_000019 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R
  assume h2: P
  have h3: R and P by and_intro h1 h2
  conclude R and P by h3

theorem prop_000020 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R -> P
  assume h2: P -> Q
  assume h3: R
  have h4: P by mp h1 h3
  have h5: Q by mp h2 h4
  conclude Q by h5

theorem prop_000021 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: Q -> P
  assume h2: Q
  have h3: P by mp h1 h2
  conclude Q -> P by h3

theorem prop_000022 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: P and Q
  have h2: Q by and_elim_right h1
  conclude Q by h2

theorem prop_000023 using intuitionistic_prop:
  assume h1: R
  have h2: R or Q by or_intro_left h1
  conclude R or Q by h2
